---
# VARIANT — Lancet (medical-journal) style citations: numeric
# superscripts in the text, references listed in order of first
# appearance, numbered separately within each multibib bib.
title: "Your paper title here"
title-footnote: |
  Footnote attached to the title.
author-format: horizontal
author:
  - name: First Author
    acknowledgements: |
      Corresponding author. Per-author thanks.
    affiliations:
      - name: University X
        department: Department of Economics
  - name: Second Author
    affiliations:
      - name: University Y
abstract: |
  Your abstract.
keywords:
  - keyword1
  - keyword2
date: last-modified

# The bundled the-lancet.csl is from citation-style-language/styles
# (CC BY-SA 3.0).
csl: _extensions/fikrurizal/econ-paper/csl/the-lancet.csl

multibib-bibliography:
  main: refs-main.bib
  appendix: refs-appendix.bib

format:
  econ-paper-pdf:
    keep-tex: true
  econ-paper-html: default
  econ-paper-docx: default
---

{{< include sections/_main.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

{{< include sections/_appendix.qmd >}}
